/usr/bin/ar qc librnnoise.a CMakeFiles/rnnoise.dir/external/rnnoise/src/denoise.c.o CMakeFiles/rnnoise.dir/external/rnnoise/src/rnn.c.o CMakeFiles/rnnoise.dir/external/rnnoise/src/rnnoise_data.c.o CMakeFiles/rnnoise.dir/external/rnnoise/src/rnnoise_tables.c.o CMakeFiles/rnnoise.dir/external/rnnoise/src/pitch.c.o CMakeFiles/rnnoise.dir/external/rnnoise/src/kiss_fft.c.o CMakeFiles/rnnoise.dir/external/rnnoise/src/celt_lpc.c.o CMakeFiles/rnnoise.dir/external/rnnoise/src/nnet.c.o CMakeFiles/rnnoise.dir/external/rnnoise/src/nnet_default.c.o CMakeFiles/rnnoise.dir/external/rnnoise/src/parse_lpcnet_weights.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib librnnoise.a
